title: Title — Jupiter Token Health Dashboard
description: Hero title slide with blockchain network background and project introduction.

title: The Challenge
description: The problem: too much crypto noise, not enough signal. Big stat: 10K+ tokens per day.

title: The Solution
description: One terminal, every signal — the dashboard as a unified intelligence layer.

title: Core Features
description: Three core pillars: Price Charts, Organic Score, and Wallet Analytics.

title: Data Layer
description: Three APIs powering the dashboard: Jupiter, DexScreener, and GeckoTerminal.

title: Tech Stack
description: Modern full-stack TypeScript: React 19, Vite, Express, Drizzle ORM, pnpm monorepo.

title: Closing — Built for Signal Hunters
description: Closing slide with GitHub link, key stats, and project tagline.
